metadata.description: The O-Matic marketplace — every O-Matic plugin in one catalog. The o-matic.ai marketplace.

plugins.name: omatic-server-connection
plugins.description: O-Matic Server connection — the MCP plugin that connects Claude Code and Codex to an O-Matic Server and ships Probot (orchestrator), Fred (storage + connection CRUD), and Data (analyst + DBA) skills. Connects to the factory brain; does not bundle a database.

plugins.name: smith
plugins.description: Critical Analyst. Smith stress-tests plans, copy, architecture, and assumptions. Cold, surgical, adversarial. Pre-mortems, assumption attacks, factory audits.

plugins.name: jo
plugins.description: Writing Coach. Jo coaches writers through feedback, structure, style, and voice development. Serves creative writers and professional communicators equally.

plugins.name: tim
plugins.description: Tool Optimizer. Tim scopes MCP connectors, documents them from live schemas, and makes sure agents use the right tool correctly on the first try.

plugins.name: rimmer
plugins.description: Evidence-first evaluator for O-Matic skills, agents, factory workflows, and plugin releases.

plugins.name: o-matic-wordpress-factory
plugins.description: O-Matic WordPress Factory plugin with bundled brand, build, writing, and visual skills plus separate WordPress and Elementor MCP connectors.
